title: Patāmundai Heavy Rain
lead: Patāmundai is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of +3.00. The city is under a high alert with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Patāmundai is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The rain is expected to continue throughout the day with a high umidita of 88% and moderate vento of 10.1 km/h. 
 The city's infrastructure is likely to be severely impacted with a CDD of 9.5 GG and HDD of 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Emergency response teams are advised to take immediate action to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
